IntuneManifest.Name: SCR-APP-108 - OneDrive Open at Login
IntuneManifest.Description: Enables the OneDrive login item via OneDrive's /createloginitem command (26.027+) so OneDrive launches automatically at login for the signed-in user. Needed because the legacy OpenAtLogin preference is deprecated and a no-op since sync app 24.113, and a Managed Login Items profile (POL-SYS-101) can only allow a login item, not enable it.
